posts.author: ClayKilnJenn
posts.text: Finally finished my new pottery piece! I spent all weekend throwing this mug on the wheel. It's going in the kiln tonight so fingers crossed it doesn't crack. So proud of myself for sticking with it despite the learning curve. #Pottery #Crafts
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless personal update about a hobby and creative achievement, containing no threats, private details or misinformation.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
